narrative:
Huber Heights 1-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,189 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
